description_long: This object consists of a group of large industrial storage tanks, including one prominent cylindrical vertical tank with a flat top and a wide concrete base, and two spherical tanks elevated on metal legs. The cylindrical tank features a metal access ladder running up its side and a safety railing around the top edge. The spherical tanks are connected by a network of metal pipes and walkways, with one of them showing visible rust and weathering. A smaller horizontal cylindrical tank, also with visible weathering and a hazard symbol, is positioned nearby and connected by pipes. The entire assembly is constructed primarily from metal, with signs of aging and industrial use, and is designed for the storage of liquids or gases in an industrial or urban infrastructure context.
description: A group of large, weathered metal storage tanks—one cylindrical, two spherical, and one small horizontal—connected by pipes, ladders, and walkways, typical of industrial storage facilities.
description_view_0: The cylindrical tank dominates the view, with its access ladder and railing visible; the spherical tank and small horizontal tank are seen to the right, connected by a walkway and pipes.
description_view_1: The cylindrical tank is seen from the side, with the small horizontal tank in front and both spherical tanks with their supporting legs and connecting walkway clearly visible.
description_view_2: The two spherical tanks are prominent, showing their supporting legs and connecting pipes, with the cylindrical tank and small horizontal tank in the background.
description_view_3: The view highlights the cylindrical tank's side and base, with both spherical tanks and their walkway visible to the left.
